title: phymatopteris veitchii
intro: Phymatopteris veitchii, also known as the Veitch's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phymatopteris veitchii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
